ahpra-els-standard.title: English language skills registration standard
ahpra-els-standard.accessNote: Four pathways (combined/school/advanced education + test); approved by Ministerial Council 14 Nov 2024

ahpra-accepted-tests.title: Accepted English language tests
ahpra-accepted-tests.accessNote: Minimum-score tables for tests on/after 23 Apr 2026; two-sitting/12-month rule; 2-year validity; IELTS One Skill Retake

ahpra-els-news-2024.title: More flexible English language pathways for practitioners registering in Australia
ahpra-els-news-2024.accessNote: Recognised countries expanded 7 to 30; writing reduced to IELTS 6.5; Cambridge added; two-test window 6 to 12 months

ahpra-els-news-2025.title: Updated English language skills registration standard — in effect 18 March 2025
ahpra-els-news-2025.accessNote: Revised ELS standard took effect 18 March 2025

mba-general-registration.title: General registration
mba-general-registration.accessNote: Who general registration may be granted to; 30 September renewal cycle

mba-specialist-registration.title: Specialist registration
mba-specialist-registration.accessNote: Specialists Register / protected title; 21 Oct 2024 supervised practice, orientation and cultural safety requirements

mba-provisional-registration.title: Provisional registration
mba-provisional-registration.accessNote: Purpose; who holds it; up-to-12-months / max two renewals

mba-limited-registration.title: Limited registration
mba-limited-registration.accessNote: Eligibility; four categories; CA/AMC-certificate IMGs apply for provisional instead

mba-limited-postgrad.title: Limited registration for postgraduate training or supervised practice

mba-limited-aon.title: Limited registration for area of need
mba-limited-aon.accessNote: Supervised practice in a workforce-shortage location; Minister declares the area of need

mba-limited-public-interest.title: Limited registration in the public interest

mba-limited-teaching-research.title: Limited registration for teaching or research

mba-nonpractising.title: Non-practising registration
mba-nonpractising.accessNote: Suitability; prohibition on treatment/opinions/prescribing/referral; reduced fee

mba-student-registration.title: Student registration
mba-student-registration.accessNote: Education provider supplies student details; student does not apply

homeaffairs-482-core.title: Skills in Demand visa (subclass 482) Core Skills stream
homeaffairs-482-core.accessNote: CSOL nomination; CSIT/AMSR salary; 1yr experience; up to 4 years (5 for HK); PR pathway

homeaffairs-482-specialist.title: Skills in Demand visa (subclass 482) Specialist Skills stream
homeaffairs-482-specialist.accessNote: ANZSCO Major Groups 1,2,4,5,6; SSIT salary; up to 4 years (5 for HK)

homeaffairs-482-labour.title: Skills in Demand visa (subclass 482) Labour Agreement stream
homeaffairs-482-labour.accessNote: Nomination under a labour agreement; 12 months experience; ENS 186 PR pathway

homeaffairs-482-english.title: English proficiency (subclass 482)
homeaffairs-482-english.accessNote: Visa English minimums (e.g. IELTS 5.0 overall and each component) — separate from registration English

homeaffairs-salary-requirements.title: Salary requirements (CSIT, SSIT, TSMIT)
homeaffairs-salary-requirements.accessNote: CSIT AUD 76,515 and SSIT AUD 141,210 for nominations 1 Jul 2025 to 30 Jun 2026; indexed annually

homeaffairs-186.title: Employer Nomination Scheme (subclass 186) visa
homeaffairs-186.accessNote: Permanent employer-sponsored; Direct Entry, Temporary Residence Transition, Labour Agreement streams

homeaffairs-186-direct-entry.title: Employer Nomination Scheme (subclass 186) Direct Entry stream
homeaffairs-186-direct-entry.accessNote: Under 45 unless exempt; CSOL occupation; 3yrs experience; skills assessment; permanent stay

homeaffairs-189.title: Skilled Independent visa (subclass 189) Points-tested stream
homeaffairs-189.accessNote: Permanent; skilled occupation list, skills assessment, invitation, points test

homeaffairs-190.title: Skilled Nominated visa (subclass 190)
homeaffairs-190.accessNote: Permanent; state/territory nomination, skilled list, skills assessment, invitation, points test

homeaffairs-dama.title: Designated Area Migration Agreements (DAMA)
homeaffairs-dama.accessNote: Agreement with state/territory/regional authority; uses subclass 482, 494, 186

homeaffairs-skill-occupation-list.title: Skilled occupation list
homeaffairs-skill-occupation-list.accessNote: Medical practitioner occupations listed; Medical Board of Australia is the assessing authority

health-19ab.title: Section 19AB restricted doctors and access to Medicare
health-19ab.publisher: Department of Health, Disability and Ageing
health-19ab.accessNote: Section 19AB 10-year moratorium; DPA (GPs) vs DWS (non-GP specialists)

health-moratorium.title: 10-year moratorium and scaling
health-moratorium.publisher: Department of Health, Disability and Ageing
health-moratorium.accessNote: Scaling credits tied to MMM remoteness; minimum 10 years; class exemption

health-exemptions.title: Section 19AB exemptions
health-exemptions.publisher: Department of Health, Disability and Ageing
health-exemptions.accessNote: Working in DPA/DWS gives indefinite exemption; assessed at provider-number application

health-dws.title: District of Workforce Shortage (DWS)
health-dws.publisher: Department of Health, Disability and Ageing
health-dws.accessNote: Areas with poor access to non-GP specialists; updated December 2023

servicesaustralia-provider-numbers.title: Provider and prescriber numbers
servicesaustralia-provider-numbers.accessNote: Provider number required to bill MBS; separate number per practice location

servicesaustralia-scaling.title: View and track scaling and exemptions
servicesaustralia-scaling.accessNote: Track scaling and 19AB location exemptions via HPOS

amc-fees.title: AMC fees
amc-fees.accessNote: Portfolio ~$642; CAT MCQ ~$2,920; clinical exam ~$3,000 in person / ~$3,400 online; WBA ~$1,070 (indicative, change without notice)

ahpra-fees.title: Fees (Medical Board of Australia)
ahpra-fees.accessNote: Registration application fee plus annual fee (~$1,058 most states, lower in NSW, 2025/26)

ahpra-fees-announcement.title: National Boards and Ahpra announce fees for 2025/26

english-tests.title: IELTS and OET test fees (provider pages)
english-tests.accessNote: Indicative 2026 pricing: IELTS ~$490, OET ~$587; confirm with provider at booking

homeaffairs-visa-pricing.title: Visa fees and charges — current visa pricing
homeaffairs-visa-pricing.accessNote: Base charges ~$3,210 (subclass 482 primary) and ~$4,910 (subclass 186 primary); family members extra

amc-psv.title: Primary source verification
amc-psv.accessNote: Verification of primary medical qualifications via ECFMG EPIC / MyIntealth
